name: CurveOrientation
summary: Defines enumerated values for closed curve orientations.

enum_values.name: Undefined
enum_values.summary: Unable to compute the curve's orientation.

enum_values.name: Clockwise
enum_values.summary: The curve's orientation is clockwise in the XY plane.

enum_values.name: CounterClockwise
enum_values.summary: The curve's orientation is counter clockwise in the XY plane.
